seoTitle: How to Keep Your Outlook Status Green (Stay Available)
metaDescription: Prevent Outlook and Teams from flipping your status to Away by adjusting sleep settings, scheduling placeholder appointments, or using keep-alive tools.
intro: Stepping away for a few minutes shouldn't make your team think you've gone dark. This guide covers adjusting your system's sleep timeout, scheduling a placeholder appointment to hold your status, and using lightweight keep-alive tools so your presence indicator stays accurately green.

steps.heading: Adjust your power and sleep settings
steps.body: Extend your system's sleep timeout so your status doesn't drop simply because your screen locked.

steps.heading: Schedule a placeholder appointment
steps.body: Create a private calendar block during time you know you'll be briefly stepping away, since it can help hold your active status.

steps.heading: Set your Show As status manually
steps.body: Set your status to Available and lock it if you know you'll be at your desk but occasionally idle.

steps.heading: Use a browser auto-refresh extension
steps.body: Keep an active browser tab refreshing periodically to prevent web-based session timeouts.

steps.heading: Run a keep-alive script if appropriate
steps.body: For approved use cases, a native PowerShell keep-alive script can prevent your system from registering as idle.

steps.heading: Verify your status
steps.body: Check your profile picture badge periodically to confirm your status remains green as expected.

faq.question: Why does my Outlook status go to Away so quickly?
faq.answer: This typically happens because your system's idle or sleep timeout is set low, which Microsoft's presence engine reads as inactivity.

faq.question: Does Outlook status sync automatically with Teams?
faq.answer: Yes, Microsoft's unified presence system syncs status across Outlook, Teams, and other connected apps in real time.

faq.question: Is using a keep-alive script against company policy?
faq.answer: That depends on your organization's IT policies, so check with your admin before running any automated keep-alive tool.

faq.question: Will a calendar placeholder appointment show as busy to others?
faq.answer: A private appointment can hold your active status, though visibility to others depends on how you configure the event's privacy settings.
